offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 compliance filings/month, manual data entry causes late submissions. We automate data extraction and formatting instead of manual data entry and reporting tools.
problem: Difficulty in consolidating data from multiple sources for compliance reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on compliance workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry interface with templates
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for submissions
Allow CSV import for existing compliance data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline steps in user onboarding process
